---
title: "Changelog"
---

## Releases

VedicDateTime releases are tracked on CRAN and GitHub.

- CRAN: https://cran.r-project.org/package=VedicDateTime
- GitHub releases: https://github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime/releases

## Recommended workflow

For a clean, complete website:

1. Maintain a `NEWS.md` file in the package repository
2. Create GitHub Releases for tagged versions
3. Keep this page short and point users to the authoritative history

If you want, we can automatically pull `NEWS.md` into this website during the build.
